label: YouTube Studio — Content Manager
description: YouTube Studio dashboard for creators — video upload, analytics, comments moderation, content management. Material Design. Requires Google login.
source_patterns: Dashboard sidebar navigation: Content, Analytics, Comments, Customization
Upload flow: select file → wait for processing → add title/description/thumbnail → set visibility → publish
Realtime analytics: numbers update every few seconds
Video list management: scroll through content list, edit metadata

active_hours.description: Business hours, content creators evening/weekend peaks

scroll.description: Content list vertical scroll — scanning video rows, moderate passes. Source: YouTube Studio Material Design

mouse.description: Deliberate, moderate speed — content management workflows

platform_specific.sequence_hint: navigate studio.youtube.com → wait for dashboard → click Upload → select file → wait for processing → fill title+description → set thumbnail → set visibility → publish → verify
